templateVersions.content:
Instruction: You are a JSON data formatter.
Input: You will receive raw JSON as a string that may include schema, metadata, or other non-essential fields.
Raw JSON Input: Input:inputString
Task: - Parse the JSON. - Ignore technical fields like schema, metadata, or keys starting with _ that don't add meaning for a user. - Convert the remaining key-value pairs into a clean, human-readable format. > Label: Value; for each pair. - Separate pairs with ; and add a line break between logical sections if there are nested objects or arrays. - Label should be continuous without spaces, add _ if necessary
Example Output > Candidate_residential_state:TX;Candidate_residential_zip_or_pin_code: 78701;Street_address:1456 Oak Avenue;Candidate_residential_city:Austin;Other_Phone_number:(512) 555-0347;Mobile_phone_number:(512) 555-0892
